description:
Advances: specled.spec_review.per_subject_tabs

render_statement_diff (html.ex:1963) runs Myers over word tokens with no coalescing and no fallback. Heavily rewritten statements (search.pipeline.batch_ready in atlas PR 62) interleave del/ins per word: 'grouped by ~~query,~~query; ~~enabling~~single-query ~~query~~search ~~expansion~~passes ~~in~~a ...' — unreadable.

Fix: (a) coalesce adjacent del/ins runs separated by short eq runs (whitespace-only or 1–2 words); (b) when changed-token ratio exceeds ~50–60%, fall back to block display — full old statement as del stacked above full new statement as ins (GitHub-style). Keep word-level for surgical edits.
title: Statement word-diff degrades to word salad on heavy rewrites
